# Abbreviations

```{python}
#| label: tbl-abbrevs
#| tbl-cap: "Table loaded from CSV file with pandas"

import pandas as pd
from IPython.display import Markdown

tab_data = pd.read_csv(
  "tbl-abbrevs.csv",
  dtype={"value": str},
  keep_default_na=False
)

md_tab = tab_data.to_markdown(
    index=False,
    colalign=("left", "left", "right"),
    maxcolwidths=[None, 45, None],
)

Markdown(md_tab)
```
